label: Firm identifier (RIC)
notes: Used to merge all inputs; not analysed

label: Environmental capability score
operationalisation: Equal-weight mean of Resource Use and Environmental Innovation theme scores
source_field: Resource Use Score (FY0); Environmental Innovation Score (FY0)
notes: Excludes the Environmental Pillar score to avoid mechanical double counting

label: Resource-use score
operationalisation: Provider theme score from public corporate data

label: Environmental-innovation score
operationalisation: Provider theme score from public corporate data

label: Log Scope 1+2 emissions
operationalisation: Natural log of direct Scope 1 plus indirect Scope 2 CO2e

label: Log Scope 1+2 / assets
operationalisation: Natural log of (Scope 1+2 CO2e / total assets)
source_field: CO2 Equivalent Emissions Total (FY0); Total Assets - Actual (FY0, USD)
notes: Assets is an imperfect denominator (see limitations)

label: Log Scope 3 emissions
operationalisation: Natural log of reported value-chain CO2e
notes: Scope 3 coverage is incomplete and method-dependent

label: Log Scope 3 / assets
operationalisation: Natural log of (Scope 3 CO2e / total assets)
source_field: CO2 Equivalent Emissions Indirect, Scope 3 (FY0); Total Assets - Actual (FY0, USD)

label: Log market capitalisation
operationalisation: Natural log of company market cap (USD)

label: Waste recycled total
notes: Absolute tonnage; no matched total-waste denominator

label: Log waste recycled / assets
source_field: Waste Recycled Total (FY0); Total Assets - Actual (FY0, USD)

label: Country group
operationalisation: HQ country; countries with < 25 firms collapsed to Other

label: TRBC economic sector
notes: Optional; enables sector-FE models when present

label: Stabilised IPW weight
operationalisation: Stabilised inverse-probability weight from the disclosure model

label: Industry sector
operationalisation: Wikidata industry mapped to 11 broad sectors plus Other

label: Raw Wikidata industry
operationalisation: Industry label as returned by Wikidata (P452)
